prompt_pl: When you look back at this moment in your life from many years in the future — what do you hope you did?
answer_options_pl: Took the risk that was waiting | Let someone fully in | Started what I knew I needed to start | Stopped something that was costing me who I was
reward_after_answer_pl: Retrospective hope clarifies current choice.
